creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 188285
poudriere build log for lang/swi-pl version 7.6.2

The port lang/swi-pl for version 7.6.2 has an install error when building in poudriere.


The relevant error message follows and I have attached the poudriere build log:

gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/swi-pl/work/swipl-7.6.2/packages'
